query:
SELECT c.id, c.externalId, c.name, c.businessName, c.isActive, c.serviceCount
FROM customers c
WHERE c.name LIKE '%BLACKBEAUTY%' OR c.name LIKE '%BLACK BEAUTY%' OR c.name LIKE '%KENSINGTON%'
   OR c.businessName LIKE '%BLACKBEAUTY%' OR c.businessName LIKE '%BLACK BEAUTY%' OR c.businessName LIKE '%KENSINGTON%'
LIMIT 10;
command:
